svg.title: Synalux POS — taUle editor
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for taUle editor. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Drag tables to position · Click to edit seats/name · Changes auto-save to pos_tables / pos_rooms
Active orders are not affected by moves.
Synalux POS · Floor Plan Editor · pos_tables + pos_rooms — drag & drop · multi-room · no hardcodes · 1366×1024
